verses.1: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd, I will not be in need.
verses.2: He lets me lie down in green pastures; He leads me beside quiet waters.
verses.3: He restores my soul; He guides me in the paths of righteousness For the sake of His name.
verses.4: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I fear no evil, for You are with me; Your rod and Your staff, they comfort me.
verses.5: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies; You have anointed my head with oil; My cup overflows.
verses.6: Certainly goodness and faithfulness will follow me all the days of my life, And my dwelling will be in the house of the LORD forever.
